name: enigmagent-vault
description: Resolve {{PLACEHOLDER}} tokens in prompts using the local AES-256-GCM encrypted vault. Your LLM never sees real API keys.
author: Francisco Angulo de Lafuente

input.label: Vault URL
input.description: Base URL of the EnigmAgent REST API.

input.label: Vault Token (optional)
input.description: Bearer token for the vault. Leave empty for localhost.
